title: CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER - 211info
text: SAFESPACE CHILDREN'S ADVOCACY CENTER OF THE GORGE CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides interviews of suspected victims of child abuse, medical evaluations, mental health treatment, and also coordinates other ancillary victim services. Also offers community prevention trainings. 206 Wasco Loop Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Survivors of abuse ages 0-17 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 436-2960 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 436-2960 Main phone (541) 436-2961 FAX Main phone (541) 436-2960 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Gilliam, Hood River, Wasco, and Wheeler Counties Services: Child Abuse Medical Evaluations Child Abuse Prevention Child Advocacy Centers Therapy Referrals * Child Abuse Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
